title: NatalErrorEnvelope
description: Error envelope returned by POST /calculate/bazi/natal. Mirrors `spec/schemas/ErrorEnvelope.schema.json` (the canonical FuFirE error envelope, Draft-07) — the shape is inlined rather than composed via `allOf` + cross-draft `$ref` to keep the 2020-12 validator chain simple; keep in sync with that file. Unlike the dayun error schema this endpoint has no endpoint-specific error code, so `error` stays an open string: typical values are `validation_error` (422, malformed request), the engine's DST/time-resolution error codes (422), `ephemeris_unavailable` (503), `rate_limit_exceeded` (429) and `internal_error` (500). TODO: replace `$id` host before production release.

error.description: Machine-readable snake_case error code (see description for typical values).

message.description: Human-readable error summary. Never echoes raw birth data (PII discipline: the validation handler strips Pydantic's input/url/ctx echoes).

detail.description: Structured diagnostic data (e.g. redacted field-level validation errors under `errors`).

status.description: HTTP status code mirrored in the body for clients that cannot inspect headers.

path.description: Request path that produced this error.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the error.

request_id.description: UUID v4 correlating this response to the X-Request-ID header.

errors.msg: Input should be less than or equal to 90
